description: Machine-readable inventory of AeroAssist smoke scripts, application-phase assertions, CI tiers, and execution-isolation requirements.

exact_current_allowlist.assertion_purpose: Validate the canonical Phase 59.0 build marker and Product Experience Recovery registration.
exact_current_allowlist.exact_reason: This smoke explicitly tests the current task-based navigation, workspace layout, diagnostic recovery, product language, permission projection, documentation, safety boundaries, readiness, and phase registration; historical capability smokes use minimum semantics.

Persisted process-local integration smoke for the V1 consolidation program. It uses an isolated in-memory database and verifies Golden Path handoffs, Sprint 2 canonical After Sales selectors, and Sprint 3 UI continuity guards, passenger-service fulfilment selectors, canonical Documents-to-Finance bridging, immutable reference evidence, agency isolation, and idempotency without changing the active phase marker.

Persisted process-local acceptance smoke for the V1 integration program. It uses an isolated in-memory database and verifies the complete Golden Path including Ticket and EMD metadata, validation failure and recovery, mismatch reconciliation, duplicate prevention, cross-agency rejection, After Sales financial linkage, canonical UI continuity, immutable reference evidence, and audit, timeline, queue, and workflow persistence without changing the active phase marker.

Minimum-phase in-memory smoke for resumable newly-created-agency onboarding, legacy exemption, canonical defaults, deterministic synthetic travel records, completion gating, tenant isolation, audit evidence, UI/API registration, and no-execution safety boundaries.

scripts.capability_name: Commercial Pilot Operations Command Centre Foundation
scripts.notes: Minimum-phase in-memory smoke for the Agency operations home, bounded aggregation, deterministic priorities, queues, timeline, actionable alerts, role-aware work-queue actions, Phase 58.1 preferences, legacy defaults, tenant isolation, registration, and safety boundaries.

Minimum-phase in-memory smoke for selectable Phase 58.3 demo profiles, deterministic and idempotent canonical generation, profile locking, referential integrity, tenant isolation, linked booking/offer/document/service/finance/timeline records, Operations Command Centre population, frontend/docs registration, and no-execution safety boundaries.

scripts.capability_name: AeroAssist Product Standards And UX Refinement
scripts.notes: Minimum-phase source-level validation for the Phase 58.4 product standards, shared components, eight priority Agency workflows, travel-first terminology, understandable states, permission-aware actions, accessible controls, canonical routes, documentation, and readiness. It does not claim browser or assistive-technology testing.

Exact-current in-memory and source-level validation for tenant-scoped Agency pilot feedback, related-record validation, permission boundaries, Platform lifecycle review, audit preservation, deterministic ready/conditionally-ready/blocked assessment, Phase 57 separation, pilot documents, contextual guidance, UI/API/module registration, safety boundaries, and legacy Agency compatibility.

Exact-current source-level and module-level validation for task-based Platform and workflow-ordered Agency navigation, catalogue projection metadata, role-aware visibility, collapsed Advanced areas, practical home routes, onboarding compatibility, optional workflow diagnostic recovery, layout primitives, canonical deep links, readiness registration, documentation, and unchanged execution boundaries.

Disposable in-memory HTTP regression for anonymous, portal, Agency Owner, Agency Read-only, cross-agency, Platform Support, Platform Admin, and Platform Owner audit-event access; bounded pagination; restricted metadata redaction; canonical route ownership; and persisted audit source-truth preservation.

Disposable in-memory HTTP and service regression proving intake conversion and request builder retain unresolved travelers at request scope, explicit identity confirmation is tenant- and role-guarded, offer creation requires confirmed passenger identities, and strict legacy intake-placeholder quarantine is non-destructive, precise, audited, and idempotent.

Source-level corrective governance smoke for forty canonical product domains, one selected target or explicit decision-required state, agency_id tenancy, immutable accepted evidence, current/compatibility writers, persistence registration, frontend consumers, lifecycle continuity, canonical routes, documentation, deterministic ordering, and honest migration blockers. It changes no runtime behavior.
Minimum evidenced by introducing commit eaba4aea and the capability registration present in that change.
